title: Forget Request
description: Request envelope for the second-brain.forget.v1 capability.

correlation_id.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to match this request to its receipt.

target_id.description: The source_id from a brain-learn receipt, or a concept path (e.g. 'infra/kubernetes/pull-policy').

reason.description: Human-readable rationale for the tombstone request.
